spec.description: Filter by check name to query a particular check
spec.title: Checks Success Rate (aggregate individual checks)

spec.expr: avg by (testid, group) (k6_http_req_blocked_$quantile_stat{tool="expb", testid=~"$testid", name!="payload_fetch", group!~"::setup::.*"})
avg by (testid, group) (k6_http_req_tls_handshaking_$quantile_stat{tool="expb", testid=~"$testid", name!="payload_fetch", group!~"::setup::.*"})
avg by (testid, group) (k6_http_req_sending_$quantile_stat{tool="expb", testid=~"$testid", name!="payload_fetch", group!~"::setup::.*"})
avg by (testid, group) (k6_http_req_waiting_$quantile_stat{tool="expb", testid=~"$testid", name!="payload_fetch", group!~"::setup::.*"})
avg by (testid, group) (k6_http_req_receiving_$quantile_stat{tool="expb", testid=~"$testid", name!="payload_fetch", group!~"::setup::.*"})

spec.description: Select a different Stat to change the query HTTP-specific built-in metrics
spec.title: HTTP Latency Timings

spec.expr: avg by (testid, group) (k6_http_req_duration_$quantile_stat{tool="expb", testid=~"$testid", name!="payload_fetch", group!~"::setup::.*"})
avg by (testid, group) (k6_http_req_duration_$quantile_stat{tool="expb", testid=~"$testid", expected_response="true", name!="payload_fetch", group!~"::setup::.*"})
avg by (testid, group) (k6_http_req_duration_$quantile_stat{tool="expb", testid=~"$testid", expected_response="false", name!="payload_fetch", group!~"::setup::.*"})

spec.description: Select a different Stat to change the query
spec.title: HTTP Latency Stats

spec.description: min/max/p95/p99 depends on the available Quantile Stats
spec.title: Requests by URL

spec.expr: sum by (testid) (irate(k6_http_reqs_total{tool="expb", testid=~"$testid", expected_response="false", name!="payload_fetch", group!~"::setup::.*"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (testid) (irate(k6_http_reqs_total{tool="expb", testid=~"$testid", expected_response="true", name!="payload_fetch", group!~"::setup::.*"}[$__rate_interval]))
avg by(testid) ({"k6_http_req_duration_$quantile_stat", tool="expb", testid=~"$testid", jrpc_method=~"engine_newPayloadV.*", name!="payload_fetch", group!~"::setup::.*"})

spec.description: Select a different Stat to change the query
spec.title: HTTP Request Duration

spec.description: Gas Usage calculation for engine_newPayload request waiting time.
spec.title: Gas Usage per Payload (Processing)

spec.description: Gas Usage calculation for full engine_newPayload request duration.
spec.title: Gas Usage per Payload (Full)

spec.expr: sum by (testid) (irate(k6_http_reqs_total{tool="expb", testid=~"$testid", expected_response="false", name!="payload_fetch", group!~"::setup::.*"}[$__rate_interval]))

spec.description: Filter by "testid" tag. Define it by tagging: k6 run --tag testid=xyz
spec.label: Test ID
spec.name: testid

spec.description: Statistic for Trend Metrics Queries. The available options depend on the values of the K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_TREND_STATS setting.
spec.label: Trend Metrics Query
spec.name: quantile_stat

spec.description: Adhoc filters are applied to all panels. To enable it, go to Dashboard Settings / Variables / adhoc_filter and select the target Prometheus data source.
spec.label: AdhocFilter
spec.name: adhoc_filter
